title: SEC Chair Paul Atkins: Era of regulatory turf wars between SEC and CFTC is over
message_html: SEC Chair Paul Atkins: Era of regulatory turf wars between SEC and CFTC is over ...
snippet: SECPaulSAtkins (@SECPaulSAtkins): RT: https://truthsocial.com/users/SECgov/statuses/116212513269790222The era of turf wars, duplicative registrations, & differing regulations between @SECgov and @CFTC is over.By aligning regulatory definitions, coordinating oversight, and facilitating data sharing,

title: Binance sues the Wall Street Journal over DOJ investigation claims, Mastercard launches a crypto partner program with Ripple and PayPal, and February CPI comes in at 0.3%
message_html: Binance sues the Wall Street Journal over DOJ investigation claims, Mastercard launches a crypto partner program with Ripple and PayPal, and February CPI comes in at 0.3% ...
snippet: CoinDesk (@CoinDesk): .@Binance sues the Wall Street Journal over DOJ investigation claims, @Mastercard launches a crypto partner program with @Ripple and @PayPal, and February CPI comes in at 0.3%. @JennSanasie has what you need to know on CoinDesk Daily.
